info.title: Express API Boilerplate
info.description: Express REST API boilerplate. Import `/api-docs.json` into Postman to generate a collection.

bearerAuth.description: JWT returned from POST /api/v1/auth/login (`token` field in response)

User.description: User object returned from auth routes (register, login, social). Does not include profilePicture — use GET /users/me for the full profile.

allOf.description: Full profile from GET/PATCH /users/me. profilePicture is hydrated from the files collection.

refreshToken.description: Refresh token from login or a prior refresh response

idToken.description: ID token from the provider SDK (Google Sign-In or Apple Sign-In)

refreshToken.description: Long-lived refresh token — store securely, send to POST /auth/refresh

requiresTwoFactor.description: When true, complete sign-in with POST /auth/2fa/verify using twoFactorToken and a TOTP code

twoFactorToken.description: Present when requiresTwoFactor is true — single-use challenge token (64-char hex)

token.description: Short-lived access JWT — send as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`

secret.description: Base32 TOTP secret for manual entry

password.description: Required when the account has a password

Pagination.description: Included on paginated list endpoints only

oneOf.description: Active upload file id from POST /uploads (images only). Send null to remove.

message.example: If that email is registered, a verification code has been sent.

files.description: One or more files (field name must be `files`)

archivedName.description: Internal archive location (not publicly served at the original URL)

example.message: Email is required from the social provider
Email not verified with the social provider
At least one file is required
Too many registration attempts, please try again later
Too many login attempts, please try again later
Too many password reset requests, please try again later
Too many reset attempts, please try again later
Too many verification attempts, please try again later
Too many resend verification attempts, please try again later
Too many refresh attempts, please try again later
Too many logout attempts, please try again later
Too many social login attempts, please try again later
Too many upload requests, please try again later
Too many requests, please try again later

get.description:
Returns OK when the server and MongoDB are reachable.
Load balancers should treat **503** as unhealthy.

post.description:
Creates the account with `emailVerified: false` and emails a 6-digit verification code.
Login is blocked until `POST /auth/verify-email` succeeds.

409.description: Email or username already in use

429.description: Too many registration attempts from this IP

post.description:
Submit the 6-digit code from the registration email.
Returns **400** for invalid or expired codes (max attempts enforced).

429.description: Too many verify-email attempts from this IP

post.description:
Sends a new verification code when the email is registered and not yet verified.
Always returns the same success message to avoid email enumeration.

429.description: Too many resend attempts from this IP

post.summary: Log in with email or username
post.description:
Send a single `identifier` (email or username) and `password`.
Returns a short-lived access JWT in `token` and a long-lived `refreshToken`.
Use `token` as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on protected routes.
When `token` expires, call `POST /auth/refresh` with `refreshToken`.
Returns **403** if the account `status` is `inactive`.
Returns **403** if the email is not verified (`POST /auth/verify-email` required).

403.description: Account is inactive or email not verified

429.description: Too many login attempts from this IP

post.summary: Log in with Google or Apple
post.description:
Exchange a provider `idToken` from Google Sign-In or Apple Sign-In for the same
token pair returned by `POST /auth/login`.

- New users are created automatically (username is generated).
- If the provider email matches an existing account, the provider is linked to that account.
- New accounts and email linking require `emailVerified: true` from the provider (no separate app email flow).
- Returning users are matched by `provider` + `providerId` and do not re-check email verification.
- Returns **403** if the account `status` is `inactive`.

400.description: Validation failed, unverified provider email, or missing email

429.description: Too many social login attempts from this IP

503.description: Social provider is not configured on the server

post.description:
Exchange a valid `refreshToken` for a new access `token` and rotated `refreshToken`.
The previous refresh token is invalidated (single-use rotation).
Returns **403** if the account `status` is `inactive`.

429.description: Too many refresh attempts from this IP

post.description:
Invalidates the provided `refreshToken` server-side.
Access tokens remain valid until they expire (keep them short-lived).

429.description: Too many logout attempts from this IP

post.description:
Send the user's email. If the account has a password, a 6-digit reset code is emailed.
Always returns the same success message to avoid email enumeration.

200.description: Generic success (sent if email is registered)

429.description: Too many password reset requests from this IP

post.summary: Set a new password with email and OTP
post.description:
Use the 6-digit code from the reset email together with the account email.
On success, all refresh tokens for that user are revoked server-side.
Log in separately with the new password to obtain a new token pair.

429.description: Too many reset attempts from this IP

post.description:
Returns a TOTP secret and `otpauth://` URL for the authenticator app.
Call `POST /auth/2fa/confirm` with a valid code to enable 2FA.

400.description: Invalid or expired setup, or invalid authenticator code

post.summary: Complete login with a TOTP code
post.description:
Used after `POST /auth/login` or `POST /auth/social` when the response
has `requiresTwoFactor: true`. Returns the same token pair as a normal login.

Requires a valid TOTP code. Password is required when the account has a password.
Revokes all refresh tokens for the user.

400.description: Not enabled, invalid code, or missing password

post.description:
Multipart upload using field name `files` (repeat for multiple files).
Storage backend is selected via `UPLOAD_DRIVER` (`local`, `s3`, `cloudinary`).
When `UPLOAD_PUBLIC_ACCESS=false`, response `url` values point to
`GET /uploads/{id}/download` (JWT required).

400.description: No files, invalid type, or too many files

get.description:
Streams an active file to the client. Requires a valid JWT.
Used when `UPLOAD_PUBLIC_ACCESS=false` (default in production).
Pass the file `id` from the upload response (recommended), or the stored `name`.

parameters.name: fileId
parameters.description: File `id` from the upload response, or stored `name`

delete.description:
Moves a file out of the active storage location so clients can no longer access it
at the original URL. The file is retained under an archive prefix/folder for
server-side recovery (`UPLOAD_ARCHIVE_PREFIX`, default `_archive`).
Only the user who uploaded the file may archive it.
Pass the MongoDB `id` from the upload response (recommended), or the stored `name`.
For Cloudinary `public_id` values that contain `/`, prefer `id` or URL-encode the name.

parameters.name: fileId
parameters.description: File `id` from the upload response, or stored `name`

400.description: Invalid file name or file already archived in storage

404.description: File not found or not owned by the current user

get.description:
Returns the full profile including a hydrated `profilePicture` object (or `null`).
Auth responses from login/register/social do not include `profilePicture`.

patch.description:
Partial update for the authenticated user. Send one or more of
`firstName`, `lastName`, `username`, `bio`, or `profilePicture`.
Email and password cannot be changed here.
For `profilePicture`, send the upload `id` from `POST /uploads`, or `null` to remove.
Responses return `profilePicture` as the full upload file object (including `url`).

403.description: Email not verified or account inactive
